testcase.name: test_sor_all_styles_returns_lifetime_fields

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_47_sor_lifetime.py:36: in test_sor_all_styles_returns_lifetime_fields assert r.status_code == 200, f"expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
